body.note: The end of life for me and how I look back
body.u: My grategreatgrand dortergranddaughteraskasked if I newknew what I wontedwanted to do when I left school because she wanted to noknow because she was levingleaving school herself but I did not noknow as I hear tell her. In 1978 on the 26 of may I left school to start work in a carpet shop (laying carpets) it lasted just over a year then I moved ofoff the island of SheppySheppey up to SevenoksSevenoakswheirwhere I was married at the age of 18 years to a girl of also 18 years we then moved to hat fildHatfield . TheirThere we had our first son. We were 23 when he was born and 1 year later my dorterdaughter was born. She was a baby of only 2 ½ pounds but after 3 years we were out having fun. The boy left home a 13 to stay with his nan because she was diyingdying and he was her favritfavouritegrand songrandson after I left the carpet shop I was earning up to 80 pounds a week. I then worked for a bilderbuilder who was an uncle (who died 12 years later but I was not working for him then I was back laying carpet till I was 36 then earning as much a 100 to 140 pounds a week then we moved to australiaAustralia working and traveling till we settled finilyfinally back on the island of SheppySheppey with both children married with children the girl married firs at 19 and the boy a 22. I went back the shop whearwhere I first started laying carpets even back to my old job. I then retirdretired some 24 years later, happy fit and with grandchildren to look after and make happy. the son and dorterdaughter did not move ofoff the Ilandisland because they both had good jobs. me and my wife then bortbought a bunglobungalow in wordenwarden bay. We were very happy until my wife was taken ill with hartheartatajsattacks which after 1 year killed her. I am now 89 and still happy but not fit my childrenschilcren's children have also got children. So I was lockeylucky to live so long and see so much with my wife but I did not plan my life. I just let it happen which for me worked I was lockeylucky. When you leveleave school have a job to start ofoff with. YourYou're 17 branibrainy and butiflebeautiful make it work out for you like it did for me. JusJust be happy.
